name: openauspex
description: A warrant canary system for Nostr, with Bitcoin block-hash anchoring and OpenTimestamps for freshness.

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/publisher/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/monitor/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/notify/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/publisher/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/monitor/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/notify/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
